checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found

llms.txt found at /llms.txt (2185615 chars)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 782 divs with only 25 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 75/452 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 2 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
Good link accessibility: 375/375 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~160,058 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 3% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 23 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~21,813 tokens (14% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.20–$2.40 per load ($1.00–$12.00 for a 5-page session)
277 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
11/32 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
Found 3 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
3 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
27 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 101ms
Moderate payload: 625KB
2 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 11 scripts
Compression enabled: gzip
